description: Context-disambiguation rules for high-ambiguity Chinese keyword terms. Each rule checks whether a substring match in a comment text supports the argumentative interpretation or is a neutral usage. Rules are applied in order; first matching rule wins for each term match.

rules.dictionaryMeaning: 直接否定或反驳对方观点，表示不赞同

rules.description: 是不是/不是...吗 as yes/no question — not argumentative
不是 + 的/了/吧/吗/呢/啊 at end — simple negation, not argumentative opener
不是...而是/就是... — corrective contrast, not attack
rules.pattern: 不是[^，。！？…]{1,15}(而是|就是|应该是|其实是|本来是)

rules.description: 不是 as factual negation with concrete subject — likely neutral info
rules.pattern: 不是[这那哪]|[^不]不是[^，。！？…]{0,8}(的|版本|问题|意思|情况|时候|地方)

rules.description: Sentence-initial 不是 with following counter-assertion (5+ chars before pause)
不是 followed by personal/judgment terms — likely argumentative negation
rules.pattern: 不是[^，。！？…]{0,10}(傻|蠢|笨|菜|垃圾|废物|脑|病|错|瞎|疯|狗|猪|恶心|离谱|搞笑|无语)

rules.description: 没有 + concrete noun (钱/时间/人/东西/办法) — simple statement of lack, not absolute denial
rules.pattern: 没有(钱|时间|人|东西|办法|用|意义|必要|关系|问题|区别|变化|影响|证据|数据)

rules.description: 没有 + verb (past experience) — factual non-occurrence, not absolute denial
rules.pattern: 没有(看|听|说|想|做|玩|吃|买|用|学|见|去|来|拿|给|发|写|读|找|得|出|进|过|到|上|下|开|关)

rules.description: 没有...那么/这样 — comparative, not absolute
完全没有/根本就没有/一点都没有 — emphatic absolute negation
rules.pattern: (完全|根本|一点|丝毫|绝对|彻底|从来|压根|从来就)[^，。！？…]{0,3}没有

rules.description: 没有 + 一个/任何/人/谁/哪个 — universal quantifier denial
rules.pattern: 没有(?:一个|任何|[人谁哪]|什么|啥|半[点个])

rules.description: 一定 + positive verb (会/能/要/可以) — neutral expression of confidence
rules.pattern: 一定(?:会|能|要|可以|有|行|成|好|对|赢|火|红|成功|没问题|没问题的)

rules.description: 一定要/一定要加油 — encouragement, not dogmatic
rules.pattern: 一定要(?:加油|坚持|努力|开心|幸福|好好|注意|记得|小心|支持)

rules.description: 一定是/一定不/一定没 — absolute claim about correctness or impossibility
rules.pattern: 一定(?:是|不是|不会|没有|不可能|得|要[^加油坚持努力开心幸福好好注意记得小心支持])

rules.description: 你一定/他一定 — asserting about others' state, potentially dogmatic
不一定/并不一定/不一定就 — explicitly non-absolute, hedged
有一定/有一定的 — 'has some degree of', descriptive not dogmatic
rules.pattern: 有一定(?:的|之|程度|影响|作用|帮助|关系|关联|道理|意义|必要|价值|参考)

rules.description: 肯定 + 啊/呀/啦 — casual affirmation, not dogmatic
rules.pattern: 肯定[啊呀啦哦呢吧]

rules.description: 应该肯定/我觉得肯定 — hedged, not absolute
rules.pattern: (?:应该|我觉得|我感觉|可能|也许|大概|估计)[^，。！？…]{0,4}肯定

rules.description: 肯定是有的/肯定是存在的/肯定是...的 — acknowledging existence rather than asserting dogma
rules.pattern: 肯定是(?:有的|存在的|对的|真的|这样|那样|可以|能|会|要)[的了吧吗呢啊]?

rules.description: 肯定选择/肯定买/肯定选/肯定去 — personal preference declaration, not dogmatic
rules.pattern: 肯定(?:选择|买|选|去|用|做|玩|吃|看|听|拿|给|换|试|搞|弄|开|关|装|配|戴|穿|带|收|付|花|投|押|赌|追|粉|站|支持)

rules.description: 肯定会/肯定能/肯定可以 — positive expectation, similar to 一定 above
rules.pattern: 肯定(?:会|能|可以|有|行|好|对|赢|没问题)

rules.description: 肯定是/肯定不是/肯定没有 — bare absolute claim
rules.pattern: 肯定(?:是|不是|没有|不|没|得|要)

rules.description: 笑死了 + 好活/太搞笑了/真的/哈哈哈 — appreciation, not mockery
笑死了 + 我/自己 — self-deprecating, not attacking others
哈哈笑死了/草笑死了 — standalone laughter reaction at content (common Bilibili norm)
rules.pattern: (?:哈哈+|草|艹|卧槽|nm|tnnd|md)[^，。！？…]{0,3}笑死了

rules.description: 笑死了 + target person — directed mockery at specific target
rules.pattern: 笑死了[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:你|他|她|你们|他们|这[个人位]|那[个人位]|up|UP|博主|主播|层主|op|原批|mxz)

rules.description: 纯哈哈哈哈哈 — standalone laughter, Bilibili norm for genuine amusement
rules.pattern: ^[哈哈哈哈哈呵呵嘿嘿嘻嘻]+[!！?？…\s]*$

rules.description: 哈哈哈 + target/judgment — directed mockery (check BEFORE appreciation rule)
rules.pattern: 哈哈+[^，。！？…]{0,15}(?:傻|蠢|笨|菜|垃圾|废物|脑残|脑|病|瞎|疯|狗|猪|恶心|离谱|搞笑|无语|就这|急了|典|乐|绷|双标|不要脸)

rules.description: 哈哈哈 + positive reaction — genuine appreciation (after mockery check)
哈哈 at sentence end — conversational filler
懂的都懂 as in-group acknowledgment — community bonding, not evasive
specific info + 懂的都懂 — shorthand for insiders, not refusing to explain
懂的都懂 as standalone evasive dismissal — refusing to elaborate
懂的都懂 in response to request for explanation — evasive
rules.pattern: (?:为什么|解释|说明|什么意思|为什么这么说).{0,20}懂的都懂

rules.description: 我觉得 + factual description — opinion framing, neutral
rules.pattern: 我觉得[^，。！？…]{0,8}(?:可以|应该|可能|也许|还[行好可以不错]|不错|挺好的|还行)

rules.description: 我觉得...吧 — hedged suggestion, not forceful assertion
我觉得 + preference/liking — personal taste, not attack
rules.pattern: 我觉得[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:喜欢|爱|好[吃看听玩]|帅|美|棒|有趣|有意思|无聊|难[吃看听]|讨厌)

rules.description: 我觉得 + negative judgment about others — assertive criticism
rules.pattern: 我觉得[^，。！？…]{0,15}(?:你|他|她|你们|他们|这[个人]|那[个人]|up|UP|博主|主播)[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:不对|错了|有问题|不行|不好|不懂|不会|不能|傻|蠢|笨|菜|垃圾|恶心|离谱)

rules.description: 我觉得 followed by bare declarative — personal assertion, borderline
全都是 + list items — simple enumeration, not absolute generalization
全都是 + wow/reaction — descriptive exclamation, not dogmatic
全都是 + negative category label — absolute generalization attack
rules.pattern: 全都是[^，。！？…]{0,12}(?:水军|黑子|孝子|脑残|傻|蠢|笨|垃圾|废物|狗|猪|喷子|杠精|谜语人|机器人)

rules.description: 都是...的 — descriptive attribution, not absolute generalization
都是 + concrete noun — simple identification/classification
rules.pattern: 都是(?:人|的|我|你|他|她|它|我们|你们|他们|她们|这个|那个|这样|那样|什么|怎么|为什么)

rules.description: 还不是都是/不都是/全都是 — common phrase, not absolute by itself
rules.pattern: (?:还不|不|全|就|都|也)[都就]?都是

rules.description: 都是...的/都是...一样/都是...差不多 — normalizing comparison, not dogmatic
rules.pattern: 都是[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:一样|差不多|类似|相同|相似|这样|那样|这么|那么)

rules.description: 都是 + blame attribution — overgeneralizing blame
rules.pattern: 都是(?:你|他|她|你们|他们|她们|up|UP|博主|官方|策划|运营|资本)[^，。！？…]{0,6}(?:的错|的问题|搞的|害的|干的|弄的|不对|不好|不行|傻|蠢|笨|垃圾)

rules.description: 都是 + negative group label — absolutist group labeling
一句话 + summarizing — transitional summary, not dogmatic assertion
一句话 + question — requesting summary, not asserting
一句话 as standalone conclusive opener — could be assertive
为什么 + neutral inquiry — genuine question, not rhetorical attack
rules.pattern: 为什么(?:会|要|是|可以|能|不|没|这么|那么|这样|那样|不能|不会|不可以|不一样|不同|不行|不好)

rules.description: 想知道为什么/好奇为什么 — explicit curiosity, not attack
rules.pattern: (?:想知道|好奇|不懂|不明白|不理解|不清楚|不知道|问问|问一下|请教|求问|请问)[^，。！？…]{0,4}为什么

rules.description: 为什么 + negative judgment — rhetorical question as attack
rules.pattern: 为什么[^，。！？…]{0,15}(?:这么|那么|这样|那样)[^，。！？…]{0,6}(?:傻|蠢|笨|菜|垃圾|废物|恶心|离谱|搞笑|无语|差|烂|不行|不好|不对|错了)

rules.description: 为什么你/他/她 + verb — accusatory why-question
rules.pattern: 为什么(?:你|他|她|你们|他们|她们)[^，。！？…]{0,6}(?:不|没|要|还|就|又|总|老是|老是|总是|一直)

rules.description: 这就是 + concrete noun — identification/filler, not absolute assertion
rules.pattern: 这就是(?:我|你|他|她|它|我们|你们|他们|她们|这个|那个|这|那|什么|为什么|怎么|哪|谁|啥|的|了|啊|呀|哦|呢|吧)

rules.description: 这就是为什么/这就是...的原因 — explanatory, not dogmatic
rules.pattern: 这就是(?:为什么|原因|理由|问题|答案|结果|区别|差距|关键|重点|核心|本质)

rules.description: 这就是 + negative label — absolute negative categorization
rules.pattern: 这就是[^，。！？…]{0,8}(?:双标|网暴|道德绑架|pua|洗脑|韭菜|割韭菜|[Pp][Uu][Aa]|水军|黑子|孝子|脑残)

rules.description: 就是 + filler/hedge — conversational filler, not absolute assertion
rules.pattern: 就是[说觉得认为想]?[，,]?(?:吧|啊|呀|哦|呢|啦|嘛|哈|嗯)

rules.description: 就是...的意思/就是说 — clarification, not dogmatic
不是...就是... — corrective contrast, not absolute
就是...的/也就是/基本就是 — descriptive or hedged, not dogmatic
就是 + negative label equation — absolute negative categorization
rules.pattern: 就是[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:傻|蠢|笨|菜|垃圾|废物|脑残|水军|黑子|孝子|喷子|杠精|恶心|离谱|差|烂|不行)

rules.description: 根本就不/根本就没有 — emphatic negation, could be either
rules.pattern: 根本就(?:不|没有|没)[^，。！？…]{0,6}(?:是|有|会|能|可以|知道|懂|明白|想|打算|准备|考虑|需要)

rules.description: 根本就不/根本就没有 + strong claim — dogmatic denial of others' position
rules.pattern: 根本就(?:不|没有|没)[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:对|行|好|可能|存在|发生|说过|做过|有过|这个道理|这么回事|那个意思)

rules.description: 根本就是 — emphatic assertion of identification
rules.pattern: 根本就是[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:傻|蠢|笨|菜|垃圾|废物|脑残|水军|黑子|孝子|喷子|杠精|错|不对|不行|不好|差|烂)

rules.dictionaryMeaning: 互联网中文表达模式 - 攻击性表达

rules.description: 你行你上 + emoji/laughter — playful banter, not serious attack
你行你上 as standalone — defensive dismissal of criticism
rules.pattern: 你行你上[啊呀哦呢吧]?[!！。？…]*$

rules.dictionaryMeaning: 讽刺对方水平低，表示轻蔑

rules.description: 就这 + self-reference — self-deprecating, not attacking
rules.pattern: 就这[^，。！？…]{0,6}(?:我|自己|咱|本人|水平|能力|实力|技术)

rules.description: 就这？ with emoji/laughter — playful, common Bilibili meme usage
就这？ targeting others' work — dismissive mockery
rules.pattern: 就这[？?]?[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:水平|能力|实力|技术|也好意思|也敢|还敢|就敢|[你他她])

rules.description: 我急了/自己急了 — self-admission, not attacking others
有人急了/是谁急了 — observational humor, mild
你急了/他急了 — direct emotional manipulation accusation
rules.pattern: (?:你|他|她|你们|他们|她们|层主|这[人位]|那[人位]|op|原批|mxz)[^，。！？…]{0,2}急了

rules.dictionaryMeaning: 典中典梗，讽刺对方言论过于经典/套路

rules.description: 典/典中典 as 1-2 char reply — meme shorthand, mild
经典/典藏 — positive or neutral usage
rules.pattern: (?:经典|典藏|名典|典故)

rules.description: 典 + targeted judgment — labeling someone's argument as cliché
rules.pattern: 典(?:中典)?[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:发言|评论|话术|话|言论|观点|看法|想法|操作|行为|表现|这人|这人|这[个人位]|那[个人位]|你|他|她)

rules.description: 觉得 + 吧/啊/呀/还/可能/应该 — hedged opinion, not forceful assertion
rules.pattern: 觉得(?:吧|啊|呀|哦|呢|啦|嘛|哈|还[行好可以不错]|可能|也许|应该|大概|估计)

rules.description: 觉得 + positive/neutral adjective — personal feeling, not attack
rules.pattern: 觉得[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:好[看听吃玩]|不错|挺好|还行|可以|一般|不错|很棒|很[好棒赞强帅美]|有点|有趣|有意思|无聊|难[看听吃]|喜欢|爱|帅|美)

rules.description: 我觉得/自己觉得/个人觉得 — self-directed, hedged assertion
觉得 + negative judgment about others — potentially argumentative
rules.pattern: 觉得[^，。！？…]{0,15}(?:你|他|她|你们|他们|up|UP|博主|主播|层主)[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:不对|错了|有问题|不行|不好|不懂|不会|不能|傻|蠢|笨|菜|垃圾|恶心|离谱|双标)

rules.description: 纯哈哈笑嘿嘿 — standalone laughter, Bilibili norm for amusement
哈哈 + target/insult — directed mockery (check BEFORE appreciation)
rules.pattern: 哈哈[^，。！？…]{0,12}(?:傻|蠢|笨|菜|垃圾|废物|脑残|脑|病|瞎|疯|狗|猪|恶心|离谱|搞笑|无语|就这|急了|典|乐|绷|你[真可]?行)

rules.description: 哈哈 + positive — genuine amusement at content (after mockery check)
哈哈 as short filler — neutral
笑死 + positive reaction — genuine amusement at content
笑死我了/笑死自己 — self-directed laughter, not mockery of others
rules.pattern: 笑死(?:我了|自己|咱|本人|[我咱本人])

rules.description: 哈哈笑死/草笑死 — compound laughter, common Bilibili norm
rules.pattern: (?:哈哈+|草|艹|卧槽|nm|tnnd|md)[^，。！？…]{0,3}笑死

rules.description: 笑死 + target — directed mockery
rules.pattern: 笑死[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:你|他|她|你们|他们|这[个人位]|那[个人位]|up|UP|博主|主播|层主)

rules.description: 可能 + 吧/啊/也许/大概/估计 — explicit hedge, not absolute
rules.pattern: 可能(?:吧|啊|呀|哦|呢|啦|嘛|性|性很[大小高低])

rules.description: 可能/有可能/可能是/不可能的/很可能 — probability language, not absolute
rules.pattern: (?:有|很|不|没|也|都|就|还是|还是[有很])?可能(?:是|有|会|能|的|性|不|也)

rules.description: 可能 + absolute claim — using hedge to disguise absolute assertion
rules.pattern: 可能[^，。！？…]{0,15}(?:一定|肯定|绝对|必然|完全|根本|全都|全部|所有|任何|永远|从不|从来)

rules.description: 应该 + 吧/啊 — hedged suggestion, not absolute
rules.pattern: 应该(?:吧|啊|呀|哦|呢|啦|嘛|的|是|有)

rules.description: 应该 + positive recommendation — polite suggestion, not dogmatic
rules.pattern: 应该[^，。！？…]{0,8}(?:可以|能|会|要|去|做|试试|看看|问问|注意|小心|考虑|参考|了解|知道)

rules.description: 应该 + moral stance — prescriptive assertion
rules.pattern: 应该[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:必须|一定|绝对|肯定|完全|都|全部|所有|每个人|任何人)

rules.description: 确实是/确实有/确实可以 — factual agreement, not argumentative
rules.pattern: 确实(?:是|有|可以|能|会|不|没|很|挺|太|比较|有点|有些|非常|相当)

rules.description: 确实...但/但是 — concessive agreement, not pure assertion
rules.pattern: 确实[^，。！？…]{0,20}(?:但|但是|不过|然而|可是|只是|问题是|关键是)

rules.description: 确实 as standalone agreement — conversational backchannel
确实 + sarcastic/negative follow-up — dismissive
adj/verb + 死了 — degree intensifier, common colloquial usage
rules.pattern: (?:笑|气|累|困|饿|渴|热|冷|忙|急|烦|愁|乐|高兴|开心|难过|伤心|痛苦|无聊|尴尬|紧张|害怕|激动|感动)[死][了啦啊哦呢]?

rules.description: 笑死了/笑哭死了 — compound laughter expression
rules.pattern: (?:笑|笑哭)[死][了啦啊哦呢]?

rules.description: 死了 + threat context — could be literal threat
rules.pattern: (?:去|该|得|要|想|让|把|弄|搞|整|打|杀|砍|捅|炸|烧)[死][了]?(?:你|他|她|你们|他们|这[个人]|那[个人])

rules.description: verb + 死了 as exaggeration — common Bilibili discourse
rules.pattern: (?:难[看听吃玩]|好[看听吃玩]|帅|美|丑|烂|差|贵|便宜|快|慢|大|小|多|少|高|低|长|短|远|近|深|浅|厚|薄)[死][了啦啊哦呢]?

rules.description: 全都 + list — enumeration, not absolute generalization
全都 + exclamation — descriptive, not dogmatic
全都 + negative label — absolutist categorization
rules.pattern: 全都[^，。！？…]{0,10}(?:水军|黑子|孝子|脑残|傻|蠢|笨|垃圾|废物|狗|猪|喷子|杠精|谜语人|机器人|假的|骗人|不行|不好|差|烂)

provenance: Hand-authored context-disambiguation rules targeting the top-20 most ambiguous Chinese terms in the Bilibili keyword dictionary. Each rule checks the surrounding context (±10 chars or full sentence) to distinguish argumentative usage from neutral/positive usage. Rules were designed based on: (1) analysis of common Bilibili comment patterns, (2) syntactic roles of Chinese function words, and (3) the mismatch between dictionary meanings and actual Bilibili discourse norms.
